name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use this bot:

Tap 📝 Generate code to describe your Python project.
The bot creates the files, then you can:
• 📦 Get ZIP — download as a ZIP archive
• ⬆️ Upload to GitHub — push to your repo

Everything is button-driven — just tap what you need.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
